paths.title: Complete Course
paths.description: All 28 lessons in recommended order, covering foundations through full pattern composition.

paths.title: Practical Application Fast-Track
paths.description: For learners who want to apply patterns to real code quickly. Skips the deep debate and gap lessons; focuses on core pressures and applied selection.

paths.title: Overuse and Economics Focus
paths.description: For learners who want to sharpen their ability to detect and prevent pattern overuse before studying the positive application cases.

paths.title: System Design Interview Prep
paths.description: Optimized for learners preparing for low-level system design interviews. Emphasizes composition, boundary selection, and pressure-based justification.
